item.title: Vídeo bem triste do capitão do Irã falando das condições que…
item.author: Serge Katz (@sk-serge.bsky.social)
item.description: Vídeo bem triste do capitão do Irã falando das condições que estão enfrentando na Copa. Tendo que viajar entre México e Estados Unidos sem tempo pra recuperar. Sem condições para competir. Não é justo nem para ser considerado uma competição. Lamentável. Uma das maiores vergonhas da história da Fifa.
item.content:encoded: Vídeo bem triste do capitão do Irã falando das condições que estão enfrentando na Copa. Tendo que viajar entre México e Estados Unidos sem tempo pra recuperar. Sem condições para competir. Não é justo nem para ser considerado uma competição. Lamentável. Uma das maiores vergonhas da história da Fifa.

item.title: 今日のGitHubトレンド hugohe3/ppt-master あらゆるドキュメントから、直接編集可能なPPTX形式…
item.author: デイリーGitHubトレンド (@dailygithubtrends.bsky.social)
item.description:
今日のGitHubトレンド

hugohe3/ppt-master
あらゆるドキュメントから、直接編集可能なPPTX形式のプレゼン資料をAIで自動生成することを目的としたリポジトリです。
item.content:encoded:
今日のGitHubトレンド

hugohe3/ppt-master
あらゆるドキュメントから、直接編集可能なPPTX形式のプレゼン資料をAIで自動生成することを目的としたリポジトリです。

item.title: 今日のGitHubトレンド IceWhaleTech/CasaOS CasaOSは低コストで個人用クラウドを構築するた…
item.author: デイリーGitHubトレンド (@dailygithubtrends.bsky.social)
item.description:
今日のGitHubトレンド

IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
CasaOSは低コストで個人用クラウドを構築するためのシステムです。
個人のデータセンターとしてデータの保存や管理を行い、SaaSコストの削減やデータ所有権の確保を目的としています。
また、スマートデバイスの連携や個人データを用いたAIアシスタントの構築も可能です。
UbuntuやRaspberry Piなどの多様なハードウェアとOSに対応しています。
item.content:encoded:
今日のGitHubトレンド

IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
CasaOSは低コストで個人用クラウドを構築するためのシステムです。
個人のデータセンターとしてデータの保存や管理を行い、SaaSコストの削減やデータ所有権の確保を目的としています。
また、スマートデバイスの連携や個人データを用いたAIアシスタントの構築も可能です。
UbuntuやRaspberry Piなどの多様なハードウェアとOSに対応しています。

item.title: New models are launching in Asia that promise Mythos-like ca…
item.author: TechCrunch (@techcrunch.com)
item.description: New models are launching in Asia that promise Mythos-like capabilities without fear of an export ban. U.S. AI labs may never recover this enormous market.
item.content:encoded: New models are launching in Asia that promise Mythos-like capabilities without fear of an export ban. U.S. AI labs may never recover this enormous market.

item.title: No country as small as Cape Verde had ever reached this stag…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: No country as small as Cape Verde had ever reached this stage of the tournament. But draws against soccer royalty helped the Blue Sharks become the mightiest minnows the tournament has ever seen. on.wsj.com/4xWFNiY
item.content:encoded: No country as small as Cape Verde had ever reached this stage of the tournament. But draws against soccer royalty helped the Blue Sharks become the mightiest minnows the tournament has ever seen. on.wsj.com/4xWFNiY

item.title: 薬の錠剤、印字100色以上可能に www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO... 三原色のうち、光を…
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
薬の錠剤、印字100色以上可能に
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

三原色のうち、光を受けると色が薄くなる性質を持つマゼンタは安全性の観点から、これまで医薬品で使うことができませんでした。

TOPPANは成分や精製方法を工夫し、耐光性を高めたマゼンタインキを開発。理論上はあらゆる色を表現可能になりました。

高齢者らが薬を見分けやすくなり、誤飲リスクを低減できます。

2026年5月 #注目された記事
item.content:encoded:
薬の錠剤、印字100色以上可能に
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

三原色のうち、光を受けると色が薄くなる性質を持つマゼンタは安全性の観点から、これまで医薬品で使うことができませんでした。

TOPPANは成分や精製方法を工夫し、耐光性を高めたマゼンタインキを開発。理論上はあらゆる色を表現可能になりました。

高齢者らが薬を見分けやすくなり、誤飲リスクを低減できます。

2026年5月 #注目された記事

item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)

Play Pointed, Bloomberg’s weekly news quiz for risk-takers.

Bet big on the topics you know, and maximize your score by leveraging your wagers. Choose wisely—wrong answers will cost you

item.title: People who don't have cats always say “Oh, but they are so i…
item.author: For the Love of Missy (@missybbbobtail.bsky.social)
item.description: People who don't have cats always say “Oh, but they are so independent & aloof." Then why is my cat trying to break down my bathroom door when I’m taking a shower?
item.content:encoded: People who don't have cats always say “Oh, but they are so independent & aloof." Then why is my cat trying to break down my bathroom door when I’m taking a shower?

item.title: A tree is not merely wood; it is a natural air conditioner, …
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: A tree is not merely wood; it is a natural air conditioner, a source of oxygen, a support for rainfall, and a sanctuary for birds. It is a safeguard for our future. When we cut down trees, we lose more than just greenery; we invite heat, drought, pollution, and suffering. 🌳 Save trees. Save lives.
item.content:encoded: A tree is not merely wood; it is a natural air conditioner, a source of oxygen, a support for rainfall, and a sanctuary for birds. It is a safeguard for our future. When we cut down trees, we lose more than just greenery; we invite heat, drought, pollution, and suffering. 🌳 Save trees. Save lives.

item.title: NEW: @opb.org and ProPublica found that water from one of Or…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description: NEW: @opb.org and ProPublica found that water from one of Oregon’s most iconic rivers, the Deschutes, is largely given away to wealthy landowners who are turning the high desert green with lush pastures and landscaping.
item.content:encoded: NEW: @opb.org and ProPublica found that water from one of Oregon’s most iconic rivers, the Deschutes, is largely given away to wealthy landowners who are turning the high desert green with lush pastures and landscaping.

item.title: SCOTUS made one thing plain this week: It is an anti-immigra…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description:
SCOTUS made one thing plain this week: It is an anti-immigrant court. There were hints before—big ones, to be honest.

But in three rulings this week, the justices voted to green-light Trump administration policies against immigrants that both defy federal law and carry a massive humanitarian toll.
item.content:encoded:
SCOTUS made one thing plain this week: It is an anti-immigrant court. There were hints before—big ones, to be honest.

But in three rulings this week, the justices voted to green-light Trump administration policies against immigrants that both defy federal law and carry a massive humanitarian toll.

item.title: HISTÓRICO! Estreante na Copa do Mundo, Cabo Verde se classif…

item.description:
HISTÓRICO! Estreante na Copa do Mundo, Cabo Verde se classifica para a próxima fase da competição.

A seleção do goleiro Vozinha enfrenta a Argentina na próxima sexta-feira (3). #FIFAWorldCup
item.content:encoded:
HISTÓRICO! Estreante na Copa do Mundo, Cabo Verde se classifica para a próxima fase da competição.

item.title: Dear America, fuck off with your advertising breaks. You don…
item.author: MrMickNL 🇳🇱 🇪🇺 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿 (@mrmicknl.bsky.social)
item.description: Dear America, fuck off with your advertising breaks. You don't get another World cup, tampering with the World game just because of your capitalist commercial obsessions! Your maleable and easily corruptable friend Infantino is gone after this one.
item.content:encoded: Dear America, fuck off with your advertising breaks. You don't get another World cup, tampering with the World game just because of your capitalist commercial obsessions! Your maleable and easily corruptable friend Infantino is gone after this one.

item.title: You know when you reach the end of a chapter and read "The d…
item.author: Glenn Evans (@vinylsol.bsky.social)
item.description: You know when you reach the end of a chapter and read "The door opened and Troy was stunned..it was Laura!"..and you're supposed to go "OMG! Laura!" but instead you start thumbing back through 200 pages muttering "who the hell's Laura??"
item.content:encoded: You know when you reach the end of a chapter and read "The door opened and Troy was stunned..it was Laura!"..and you're supposed to go "OMG! Laura!" but instead you start thumbing back through 200 pages muttering "who the hell's Laura??"

item.title: Hoy es el cumple de mi Canela. 8 años, 7 con nosotros. Llegó…

item.description: Hoy es el cumple de mi Canela. 8 años, 7 con nosotros. Llegó a casa persiguiendo a mi hijo que estaba dando una vuelta en bici por el campo.
item.content:encoded: Hoy es el cumple de mi Canela. 8 años, 7 con nosotros. Llegó a casa persiguiendo a mi hijo que estaba dando una vuelta en bici por el campo.

item.title: Die schlechte Nachricht: Noch nie wurde in Deutschland ein K…
item.author: Matthias Oomen (@oomenberlin.bsky.social)
item.description:
Die schlechte Nachricht: Noch nie wurde in Deutschland ein Kanzler oder eine Kanzlerin abgewählt, nachdem Deutschland Fußball-Weltmeister wurde.

Die gute Nachricht: Wenn alles normal läuft, kommt im Achtelfinale Frankreich. Und dann erledigt sich die Gefahr der Serie sportlich.
item.content:encoded:
Die schlechte Nachricht: Noch nie wurde in Deutschland ein Kanzler oder eine Kanzlerin abgewählt, nachdem Deutschland Fußball-Weltmeister wurde.

Die gute Nachricht: Wenn alles normal läuft, kommt im Achtelfinale Frankreich. Und dann erledigt sich die Gefahr der Serie sportlich.

item.title: As temperatures soar across Europe, cities are struggling to…

item.content:encoded: As temperatures soar across Europe, cities are struggling to adapt, further exacerbating socioeconomic divisions
